title: Teams trigger node production URL issue
symptom: When trying to enable the workflow with a Teams trigger node, an error indicates that the production URL cannot be corrected, preventing the workflow from going live.
applies_when: Running n8n behind a reverse proxy
not_this_if: The error does not mention the production URL
root_cause: The production URL for the webhook is not being set correctly, likely due to misconfigured environment variables. This can happen when n8n is running behind a reverse proxy and the necessary URLs are not properly defined.
fix_steps: Set the following environment variables: N8N_HOST, N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL, and WEBHOOK_URL to the correct public URL.
If using workers, ensure to set the WEBHOOK_URL in the worker configuration as well.
agent_instruction: Configure the environment variables for n8n to ensure the production URL is set correctly.
